pages.text: In Consumables, choose Fuel Target and place an item in the input. The $(thing)Auto target$() chooses between Fuel and Brew Energy; you may select either pool directly. Changing page or closing the terminal never consumes an item that was not accepted.

$(thing)Runtime Fuel:$() any item with a positive current $(thing)runtime burn time$() is accepted, including logs, datapack fuels, and compatible modded fuels. Each item adds that many Fuel ticks. Container items return normally, and an overflowing conversion leaves the input untouched.

$(thing)Brew Energy:$() Blaze Rod adds 1,200 and Blaze Powder adds 600. Auto first chooses the compatible pool with fewer accepted item sources, then the lower stored amount, then a stable order. A Blaze Rod therefore chooses Brew Energy when both pools are otherwise tied.

$(thing)Axe Energy:$() an accepted axe is consumed. Finite value comes from remaining $(thing)durability$() × ($(thing)Unbreaking$() level + 1) × stack count; Mending adds nothing. An $(thing)Unbreakable$() axe supplies infinity. Supported strip, scrape, and wax-off recipes spend one Axe Energy each.
